summary: Planned conservative non-mutating inventory classifications for ten open PRs. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening action is planned because the job disables instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr; several PRs also have unresolved maintainer/product-review gates, failing real-behavior proof, or actionable bot-review findings.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR, but this job is inventory-only and cannot merge or fix; maintainer review remains the canonical next gate.
Focused candidate but not closable or mergeable by this worker; proof and technical correctness require maintainer judgment.
Actionable bot-review findings and failing real-behavior proof require author/maintainer follow-up; the job disallows fixes.
Actionable bot-review findings and failing real-behavior proof block any stronger disposition; fix actions are not allowed.
This is a product-direction/maintainer judgment about changing default session lifecycle behavior; the job requires human review for maintainer signal and technical correctness.
The artifact does not prove the actionable Copilot concern is resolved despite later commits, and proof is failing; human or fresh review is required.
Broad feature spike with active author follow-up and product/technical correctness questions; not a boring low-signal close and not merge/fix eligible in this job.
Actionable bot-review findings and failing checks block any close/merge path; fixes are disallowed by job.
Actionable bot-review findings and failing proof/checks require author or maintainer follow-up; no fix action is allowed.
Focused bug-fix candidate, but failing real-behavior proof and ClawSweeper needs-changes status require author/maintainer follow-up; job disallows fixes and merge.
Security-sensitive linked ref routed to central OpenClaw security handling only.
Security-sensitive linked ref routed to central OpenClaw security handling only.
